label: Making faction conditional maker
description: Runs the nested maker only when the making faction matches the specified faction def or faction category tags.

makingFaction.label: Making faction
makingFaction.description: FactionDef that must match the making faction for the condition to pass.

makingFactionCategories.label: Making faction categories
makingFactionCategories.description: List of faction categoryTag strings. The condition passes if the making faction has any of these category tags.

requireNonNull.label: Require non-null
requireNonNull.description: When true, the condition fails if no making faction is present at all.
